subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-07-19 in New York
subcodes.first_line: There is a spiritual understanding or communication. You are always associating or affiliating with Me.
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow
